warnings: Performance warnings for bundle size (expected, not blocking)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structure remain synced. Card template change only affects parts/card-search.php (used by PHP). TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender which previews PHP output including card hover states.

testPage.notes: Existing test page unchanged - fix applied to card template only

fixesApplied.userRequest: Use the lighter accent color for the hover background
fixesApplied.description: Card hover background was using accent color (full saturation). User requested lighter accent color for softer hover effect.

changes.notes: Changed card hover background from accent (full saturation) to accent-lighter (lighter pastel variant). Uses theme accent color system which adapts to page accent (neon-green, blue, green, yellow, orange, purple).

after.description: Lighter pastel variant of accent color

colorTokens.colorSystem: Theme uses dynamic accent color system. --accent-color-lighter automatically adapts based on page accent class (neon-green, blue, green, yellow, orange, purple). Each color has -light and -lighter variants defined in colors.css.

implementationNotes.hoverBackground: Card hover now uses bg-accent-lighter instead of bg-accent. Provides softer, more subtle hover effect while maintaining clear visual feedback. Text remains group-hover:text-charcoal for readability.
implementationNotes.dynamicAccent: The accent-lighter color adapts to page accent context. Default: rgba(238, 255, 181, 1) (light neon green). Blue pages: rgba(181, 234, 250, 1) (light blue). Purple pages: rgba(225, 213, 239, 1) (light purple). System defined in resources/css/screen/colors.css lines 33-119.
implementationNotes.pillHover: Post type pill remains bg-accent-lighter (non-hover state). On card hover, pill changes to bg-white/80 border-charcoal/20 for differentiation from card background.
implementationNotes.contrastRatio: Charcoal text on accent-lighter background maintains WCAG AA contrast. Lighter background provides better readability than full accent.
implementationNotes.transitionEffect: Smooth color transition via transition-colors class. Background, text, and pill colors all animate on hover.
implementationNotes.consistencyNote: Pill uses accent-lighter in default state, card uses accent-lighter on hover. Creates cohesive color palette using same lightness level.

verificationSteps: Build compiled successfully with no errors (performance warnings only)
TSX/PHP structure sync verified - no structural changes
Color token verified: bg-accent-lighter utility exists in colors.css
Dynamic accent system verified: --accent-color-lighter defined for all accent variants
